# Durand Future Health

> Durand Future Health® is a predictive health intelligence company. With you for Life®.

## What We Do

Durand Future Health replaces traditional Employee Assistance Programs (EAPs) with EHAP — the Employee Health and Assistance Plan. EHAP combines:

- **Home-based multi-omics blood testing** (epigenetics, proteomics, metabolomics) via a painless peel-and-stick device — no nurse visit required
- **AI-powered health risk assessment** across 40+ organ systems with 5–10 year forward-looking detection for conditions including cognitive health, inflammation, organ function, and cancer risk
- **6 coaching sessions** with a dedicated health professional
- **Secure AI Health Agent** available in 40+ languages
- **Care navigation** to outcomes-focused providers for weight loss, menopause, pain management, hormonal health, and more

## How It's Distributed

EHAP is offered at a Per Employee Per Month (PEPM) cost of $3–5, designed to replace existing EAP line items with no new budget required. Distribution is through:

- **Benefits brokers and consultants** (10% commission + warrants)
- **Insurers and health plans** (e.g., GreenShield Health, KeyHealth)
- **Employers** directly
- **Individuals** at $499 for a comprehensive health assessment

## Key Differentiators

- Traditional EAPs see only 3–5% utilization and are reactive (crisis-only). EHAP is proactive with continuous monitoring.
- Unlike competitors (e.g., Function Health, Nia Health), Durand offers home-based testing, multi-omics/epigenetics (not just blood panels), and forward-looking risk prediction (5–10 years, not point-in-time snapshots).
- 100% virtual product — no clinics, no in-person visits
- AI-powered platform integrating 30+ apps and wearables
- Health data is never resold — Durand protects member data

## The Durand® Difference

"Every other system resets to zero. Durand® never forgets."

Every clinic visit, every EAP session, every annual checkup ends the same way. The data disappears, the relationship ends, and the next provider starts from scratch. Durand is the only platform where health intelligence is continuous and compounding. The longer you are on the platform, the smarter it becomes. Your health story is never erased.
